src: ArgoCD-Basics-to-Production is a beginner-friendly repository designed to help you understand GitOps and Argo CD from fundamentals to real-world production use. It covers GitOps concepts, Argo CD architecture, and hands-on deployment workflows, organized as a progressive learning series.
ja: ArgoCD-Basics-to-Productionは、GitOpsとArgo CDを基礎から実際の本番運用まで理解するための初心者向けリポジトリ。GitOpsの概念、Argo CDのアーキテクチャ、実践的なデプロイワークフローを段階的な学習シリーズとして網羅。
